_comment_meta: Wire contract between MopVendorMatchingRulesProvider (TS) and VendorMatchingService (C++). When you change this file, mirror the change in mortgage-origination-platform/tests/fixtures/vendor-matching-contract.json (the C++ Catch2 test loads the same shape). The contract is asserted from BOTH sides — drift surfaces as a test failure in whichever side wasn't updated.
_comment_owner: Phase 2 of docs/AUTO_ASSIGNMENT_REVIEW.md; service-to-service via MOP auth-proxy with X-Service-Auth header.

request._comment: Shape POSTed by MopVendorMatchingRulesProvider.evaluateForVendors to /api/v1/vendor-matching/evaluate. evaluations[] preserves caller order; results[] mirrors that order.

response._comment: Shape returned by VendorMatchingService.evaluateBatch. results[] length and order MUST match request.evaluations[]. Each result's appliedRuleIds is the union of all rule names whose actions fired. denyReasons is the human-readable strings collected from vendor_denied facts. scoreAdjustment sums numeric points from vendor_score_adjustment facts.
